name: 2pk Solid Deep Patio Furniture Cushion Set Dark Green - Threshold™
description:
Make your home feel like a calm sanctuary with this 2-Pack Solid Deep Patio Furniture Cushion Set from Threshold™. This set includes a chair seat cushion and a back cushion with polyester filling to deliver a relaxing seating experience. Made of 100% recycled polyester, these cushions feature solid green hues for a cool, serene vibe. Designed with a zipper closure for a neat finish, this fade-resistant cushion set stays fresh season after season.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
